Container.Name: musicseerr
Container.Overview: MusicSeerr is a self-hosted music request and discovery app built around Lidarr. Search the full MusicBrainz catalogue, request albums, stream music from Jellyfin or Navidrome, discover new music based on your listening history, and scrobble to ListenBrainz and Last.fm. Requires a running Lidarr instance.
Container.Requires: A running Lidarr instance with an API key. Lidarr nightly build is recommended.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: lidarr music request scrobble listenbrainz lastfm jellyfin navidrome

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port the MusicSeerr web interface listens on.

Config.Name: Music Library
Config.Description: Optional: mount your music library root for local file playback. Must match the root folder Lidarr uses and the Music Directory Path in MusicSeerr Settings > Local Files.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions inside the container. Run 'id' on your Unraid terminal to find your value.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions inside the container. Run 'id' on your Unraid terminal to find your value.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Your timezone. Examples: America/New_York, Europe/Berlin, Asia/Tokyo.

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: Umask for file creation permissions inside the container.
